title: Creeper With Arms
description:
This makes the creeper have animated arms!! 
[REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR SIMILAR]
body:
A pack that gives the default creeper moving arms! This pack requires either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [EMF (Entity Model Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work.

**This pack adds:**
- Custom Arm Animations™
- Arms
